project.name: Velox
project.description: Self-hosted media server like Jellyfin/Emby but lighter. Go backend + React frontend.

backend.chromaprint: fpcalc CLI (brew install chromaprint / apk add chromaprint)

tooling.frontend_linter: ESLint flat config (TS + React Hooks + React Refresh)

database_schema.summary: 27 tables across 27 migrations. Media server stores: libraries, movies/episodes (logical), video files (physical), series/seasons, genres, people/credits, subtitles, audio tracks, users, watch progress, favorites, sessions, app settings, media markers (skip intro/credits), audio fingerprints (chromaprint cache), notifications, pre-transcode profiles/files/queue. Migration 027 adds 1440p+4K pretranscode profiles.

016_subtitle_search: app_settings used for OpenSubtitles/Podnapisi API keys
017_metadata_providers: app_settings used for OMDb/TVDB/Fanart.tv API keys

key_patterns: Logical vs Physical: media (content) ↔ media_files (file on disk)
Series chain: series → seasons → episodes → media → media_files
Unified user_data: progress + favorites + rating in 1 table (Emby pattern)
XOR polymorphic: media_genres/credits CHECK exactly one of media_id/series_id
Provider IDs: tmdb_id + imdb_id + tvdb_id indexed directly
App settings: key-value JSON store for provider API keys + admin config + cinema settings + pretranscode settings
Media markers: per media_file, source priority manual(3) > chapter(2) > fingerprint(1)
Audio fingerprints: BLOB cache per (media_file_id, region), ON DELETE CASCADE
Metadata lock: metadata_locked flag prevents rescan override, auto-set on edit
Pre-transcode: profiles (quality presets) → files (encoded outputs) → queue (job scheduling). CASCADE delete on media_file removal.

metadata_editor.api: PATCH /api/media|series/{id}/metadata — partial update (pointer fields, nil=don't change). PATCH /api/episodes/{id}/metadata for episodes.
metadata_editor.image_upload: POST /api/media|series/{id}/images — multipart upload, resize via imaging lib, local:// path prefix in DB. GET /api/images/local/{type}/{id}/{filename} to serve.
metadata_editor.nfo_write: POST /api/media|series/{id}/nfo — XML generation (movie/tvshow/episodedetails). Atomic write + .nfo.bak backup.
metadata_editor.metadata_lock: metadata_locked flag on media + series. Rescan skips locked items. Identify auto-unlocks. RowsAffected check on all update repos.
metadata_editor.ui: MetadataEditor slide-over panel, GenreEditor tag input, CreditEditor cast/crew list, ImageUploader drag-drop. EpisodeEditDialog for per-episode edit.

streaming.stream_url: POST /api/stream/{id}/url — generates Jellyfin-style api_key (32-char hex, 2h expiry, in-memory store). URL: /api/stream/{id}?api_key=xxx
streaming.api_key_store: auth/apikey.go — in-memory map with background cleanup every 10min. Auth middleware checks api_key query param before JWT.
streaming.chromecast: useChromecast hook + WatchTopBar Cast button. Uses Google Cast SDK (Default Media Receiver). Loads stream URL with api_key for Chromecast to fetch directly.
streaming.cinema_mode: Netflix-style: trailer autoplay muted in detail page backdrop via YouTube IFrame API (YouTubeBackground component). Hover media card 2s → trailer preview. GET /api/media|series/{id}/cinema returns trailer list from TMDb videos. Admin settings: cinema_mode_enabled, cinema_max_trailers, cinema_intro_path.

pretranscode.overview: Netflix-style offline encoding. Background scheduler encodes media into H.264+AAC MP4 at configurable quality (480p/720p/1080p/1440p/4K). Playback engine serves pre-encoded files instantly (http.ServeContent, <100ms) with fallback to realtime transcode.
pretranscode.scheduler: Background goroutine. Schedule modes: always, night (00:00-06:00), idle. Configurable concurrency (1-4). Auto-pause on disk low.
pretranscode.skip_logic: No upscale (source < profile height). Skip if source already H.264+AAC at ≤ profile resolution.
pretranscode.audio: Transcode to AAC stereo by default. Copy if source already AAC.
pretranscode.hw_accel: Try HW first (vaapi/nvenc/qsv/videotoolbox), auto-fallback to software libx264.
pretranscode.playback_integration: MethodPreTranscode in playback engine. Stream handler checks pre-transcode before normal decision. Playback info returns available_qualities with ⚡ instant indicator.
pretranscode.on_demand_remux: When user triggers realtime transcode at a resolution with a pretranscode profile, auto-remux HLS segments → MP4 (ffmpeg -c copy, near instant). Only when pretranscode_enabled=true. 'Transcode once, instant forever.'
pretranscode.stop_behavior: Stop kills FFmpeg process immediately (ctx cancel), waits for scheduler loop exit, resets interrupted jobs to queued for retry, restarts scheduler in paused state.
pretranscode.recovery: On startup, reset interrupted encoding jobs back to queued.
api_endpoints: POST /api/admin/pretranscode/start — enqueue all libraries + start scheduler
GET /api/admin/pretranscode/estimate?library_id=N — storage estimation per profile + disk free
POST /api/admin/pretranscode/cleanup-files — delete all pre-transcode files + disable
pretranscode.ui: PretranscodeSection in SettingsPage.tsx: toggle, profile checkboxes, schedule/concurrency selects, storage estimation panel, real-time progress dashboard (5s poll), pause/stop/start controls, cleanup with confirmation modal.

metadata_providers.TMDb: Primary — movies + TV. Env-based API key (VELOX_TMDB_API_KEY). Rate-limited (40req/10s token bucket). Fetches videos (trailers) via append_to_response.
metadata_providers.OMDb: Enrichment — IMDb rating, Rotten Tomatoes %, Metacritic score. Env-based API key (VELOX_OMDB_API_KEY).
metadata_providers.TheTVDB: TV enrichment — TVDB IDs, IMDb cross-reference, series status. Env-based API key (VELOX_TVDB_API_KEY).
metadata_providers.Fanart.tv: Artwork enrichment — HD clearlogos, thumbnails. Env-based API key (VELOX_FANART_API_KEY).
metadata_providers.TVmaze: TV enrichment — network, status, external ID cross-reference. Free, no key needed.
metadata_providers.NFO: Local override — NFO files take priority over TMDb search. NFO write support added (Plan L).
metadata_providers.config: All provider API keys configurable via: 1) Environment variables (server admin) → 2) Admin Settings UI (custom override). UI shows has_builtin status.

subtitle_providers.OpenSubtitles_v2: REST v2 API. Requires API key + username + password. Rate limited 1req/sec (throttle added).
subtitle_providers.OpenSubtitles_legacy: Legacy REST API (rest.opensubtitles.org). Free, no key needed. Rate limited 1req/sec (throttle added). Default when v2 not configured.
subtitle_providers.Subdl: REST API. Env-based API key (VELOX_SUBDL_API_KEY) or custom via admin settings. Rate limited 1req/sec (throttle added). Daily quota limit on free tier.
subtitle_providers.BSPlayer: SOAP/XML API. Anonymous auth (no API key). Rate limited 1req/sec (throttle added).
subtitle_providers.Podnapisi: XML API. No API key. Rate limited 1req/sec (throttle added). Often returns 429.
subtitle_providers.Subscene: Web scraper via Python (DrissionPage + Chrome). Bypasses Cloudflare. Slowest (~30s). Used in AutoDownload Phase 2 fallback only.
subtitle_providers.throttle: All providers share subprovider.Throttle (1 req/sec per provider). Prevents rate limiting during bulk auto-download.

intro_credits_detection.tier1_chapter: Enhanced regex (Jellyfin patterns: OP/ED, recap, cold open, outro). Timing: intro 15-120s, credits 15-450s.
intro_credits_detection.tier2_chromaprint: Audio fingerprint via fpcalc CLI. Per-season pairwise comparison. Confidence 0.7-0.9.
intro_credits_detection.tier3_blackframe: FFmpeg blackframe + silencedetect filters. Credits only. Confidence 0.55-0.75.
admin_api: GET /api/admin/markers/stats — aggregate counts (total, intro, credits, by source, coverage %)
POST /api/admin/markers/detect — run detector on single file
POST /api/admin/markers/backfill — bulk detection (file_ids, season_id, or library_id). Library backfill runs async with WebSocket progress.
intro_credits_detection.websocket_progress: BroadcastToAdmins('marker_progress', {status, total, current, processed, skipped, failed, file_name}). Frontend: useMarkerProgress hook opens dedicated WS connection, reads token from Zustand velox-auth store.

layers: respondJSON wraps success in {"data": ...}, logs encode errors
storage/image.go — local image storage + resize via disintegration/imaging
auth/apikey.go — in-memory API key store for external player stream URLs
architecture.scan_pipeline: Pipeline (scanner/pipeline.go). Stages: discover → fingerprint → probe → parse → persist. Respects metadata_locked flag.
architecture.file_watcher: watcher/watcher.go — fsnotify recursive, 5s debounce, rename tracking.
architecture.playback_strategy: Direct Play (best) → PreTranscode ⚡ (if user requests lower res or codec incompatible) → Direct Stream → Transcode Audio → Full Transcode. Quality selector: resolution-based Netflix-style (Original → 1080p⚡ → 720p → 480p → Auto). available_qualities in playback info response. GetPlaybackInfo parallelizes DB queries (prefs+progress+subtitles+audio in goroutines, quality+markers in goroutines). buildQualityOptions uses single JOIN query (ListReadyFilesWithProfiles) instead of N+1.
architecture.auth: JWT (15min access + 7-day refresh + session_id), bcrypt cost 12. API key (2h, 32-char hex) for external players. Change-password returns 403 (not 401) for wrong old password to avoid triggering token refresh loop. Frontend fetch interceptor skips auto-refresh for /auth/change-password.
architecture.activity_logging: ActivityService (async, buffered 50 entries / 5s flush). Injected into AuthHandler (login), LibraryHandler (library_scan), PlaybackHandler (play_start) via SetActivityService setter. Activity page uses invalidateQueries on mount for fresh data.
architecture.subtitle_search: Multi-provider: OpenSubtitles (v2 if configured, legacy fallback) → Subdl → Podnapisi → BSPlayer.
architecture.docker: Multi-stage Dockerfile: Node 22 → Go 1.24 → Alpine 3.21. Nginx + chromaprint + Xvfb.
architecture.auto_sub_on_rescan: Force rescan triggers auto-download subtitles for media missing text-based subs (SRT/ASS/VTT). PGS/VobSub don't count — always download SRT.
architecture.gpu_docker: Intel: libva + intel-media-driver + libva-intel-driver (VAAPI). AMD: mesa-dri-gallium (VAAPI). NVIDIA: host nvidia-container-toolkit (NVENC). LIBVA_DRIVER_NAME=iHD default in entrypoint. HW detect at startup: auto → probe ffmpeg -hwaccels + device check.
architecture.websocket_nginx: Separate location /api/ws with Upgrade + Connection headers. Main /api/ location uses Connection '' for streaming. statusWriter implements http.Hijacker for WebSocket upgrade through middleware.
architecture.transcode_cleanup: Scheduler task: every 1h, delete HLS cache > 2h old. Prevents disk fill from realtime transcode sessions.
architecture.hls_transcoding: Single FFmpeg process for multi-audio HLS (video + all audio outputs in one pass via multi-output syntax). Master playlist written before encoding starts. Audio playlists namespaced with variant prefix ({prefix}audio_{streamIdx}.m3u8) to prevent cache collision. HLS EVENT mode on all realtime transcode paths. WaitForSegment waits for ALL active jobs in directory before 404 (prevents wrong-variant match). Job lifecycle: close(done) before delete(active). First-segment timeout: 3 minutes. HW accel fallback to software on failure.

ui_components.action_menu: ActionMenu.tsx — reusable dropdown (portal-based, z-9999). Used in EpisodeCard + MediaDetailPage.
ui_components.metadata_editor: MetadataEditor.tsx — slide-over panel. GenreEditor, CreditEditor, ImageUploader sub-components.
ui_components.youtube_background: YouTubeBackground.tsx — YouTube IFrame API wrapper. Programmatic mute/unmute (no YouTube UI visible).
ui_components.cinema_overlay: CinemaOverlay.tsx — fullscreen intro/trailer player (kept for potential future use).
ui_components.i18n: Full i18n support: react-i18next + i18next-browser-languagedetector. Namespaces: common, auth, navigation, settings, media, watch, errors. SettingsPage fully translated (en/vi).
ui_components.pretranscode_settings: PretranscodeSection in SettingsPage.tsx — toggle, profiles, schedule, storage estimation, progress dashboard with real-time polling.
ui_components.notifications_page: NotificationsSection in SettingsPage — /settings?section=notifications. Full list with filter (All/Unread), limit selector, mark as read, delete. NotificationBell 'View all' navigates here (not Activity).
ui_components.toggle_component: ui/Toggle.tsx — reusable toggle switch (h-6 w-11, netflix-red when enabled). Used in Cinema Mode + Pre-transcode settings.
ui_components.cinema_mode_guard: useCinemaMode.ts hooks check cinemaSettings.enabled before fetching trailers. MediaCard hover preview also gated. When cinema disabled: no YouTube embeds, no trailer fetches.
ui_components.select_component: ui/Select.tsx — reusable select with custom SVG chevron (appearance-none). Sizes: sm/md. Used in all SettingsPage selects. Replaces native browser select arrow.
ui_components.markers_section: MarkersSection in SettingsPage — /settings?section=markers. Stats overview (total/intro/credits, coverage bars, source breakdown), Run Detection with library selector, WebSocket realtime progress (useMarkerProgress hook), How it works info.
ui_components.quality_selector: Netflix-style resolution menu in WatchPage player. Options from playback info available_qualities (dynamic). Pretranscode files show ⚡ icon. Auto option at bottom with border separator.
ui_components.subtitle_letterbox: DualSubtitleOverlay.tsx — useLetterboxBottom hook calculates bottom letterbox height for portrait viewing. Subtitle bottom = letterboxBottom + BASE_BOTTOM (112px). Recalculates on resize/orientation change/loadedmetadata. Prevents subtitles from appearing in black bars on portrait tablets.
ui_components.watch_page_layout: WatchPage container uses fixed inset-0 (not h-screen) to prevent scroll on portrait tablets with 16:10 aspect ratio.
ui_components.scheduler_tasks_ui: TasksSection sorts by name (prevent row jumping). Polling every 2s when task running. Local running state + server state combined. Button shows 'Running...' during execution.

plans.J: Netflix-style Series Grouping + URL Routing (4 phases)
plans.L: Metadata Editor (4 phases: PATCH API, image upload, editor UI, NFO write)
plans.M: Search, Filter & Folder Browser (3 phases: backend API, frontend filter, folder browser)
plans.N: Multi-language Support (5 phases: i18n setup, English strings, Vietnamese, switcher, polish)
plans.P: Pre-transcode / Offline Encoding (5 phases: DB+settings, engine, playback integration, UI, testing)

conventions.language: Vietnamese in plans, English in code/commits
